subsidyType: ongoing utility replacement program that replaces lead and galvanized customer-owned lines at no direct cost
publicSideCovered: yes Iowa American Water coordinates utility-side replacement as part of the program
privateSideCovered: yes customer-owned lead and galvanized lines are replaced at no direct cost
propertyRules: lead galvanized or unknown customers identified through the map and notice letters are part of the ongoing replacement effort
contractorRules: Iowa American Water coordinates the replacement process and depends on customer cooperation to identify remaining lines
